---
title: "Welcome!"
about:
    template: trestles
    # image: [relative path to headshot]
    links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/stevenjwang
      target: _blank # opens link in a new browser tab
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/stevenjwang
      target: _blank # opens link in a new browser tab
---
---

Hi! I'm Steven Wang. I'm a UC Berkeley undergrad studying Applied Mathematics and Data Science. WIP--poke around!
